description_long: This is a rectangular, modern-style house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The front features two garage doors and a main entryway with large windows above, allowing natural light into the interior. The house is organized with multiple rooms, visible staircases, and an open-plan living area that includes greenery, likely an indoor garden or courtyard. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, contrasted by white and brown window frames and doors. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with glass elements for windows and metal for railings and garage doors. The overall design emphasizes functionality and simplicity, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, rectangular house with a flat roof, large windows, and a double garage, featuring minimalist beige and white finishes and an open-plan interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage doors, main entryway, large windows, and visible staircase inside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, window placements, and a glimpse of the interior courtyard with greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view with fewer windows, showing the back rooms and the open-plan layout inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the staircase, interior layout, and additional window placements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with large glass windows above, double garage doors, and a simple, step-free approach
